---
title: "test_file.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\sandbox_test_pennyone\test_file.ts"

complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.82
style_score: 10.00
intel_score: 2.00
overall_score: 6.47
---

## Intent
Mocked intent

## Interaction Protocol
Mocked protocol

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 10.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `x`
- `x`
